chapter_title.ar: باب الْحَدِّ عَلَى مَنْ يَأْتِي الْبَهِيمَةَ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 25 – The Penalty (Hadd) upon the one who goes to the animal (bestiality)

text: سَأَلْتُ أَبَا عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) عَنِ الرَّجُلِ يَأْتِي بَهِيمَةً أَوْ شَاةً أَوْ نَاقَةً أَوْ بَقَرَةً قَالَ فَقَالَ عَلَيْهِ أَنْ يُجْلَدَ حَدّاً غَيْرَ الْحَدِّ ثُمَّ يُنْفَى مِنْ بِلَادٍ إِلَى غَيْرِهَا وَ ذَكَرُوا أَنَّ لَحْمَ تِلْكَ الْبَهِيمَةِ مُحَرَّمٌ وَ لَبَنَهَا .

en.hubeali: Ali Bin Ibrahim, form Muhammad Bin Isa, form Yunus, from Sama’at who said,

‘I asked Abu Abdullahasws about the man who went to an animal, or a sheep, or a camel, or a cow. So heasws said: ‘Upon him is that he would be whipped a Penalty (Hadd) less that the (complete) Penalty (Hadd). Then he would be exiled from the city to another one’. And theyasws have mentioned that the flesh of that animal is Prohibited, along with its milk’.
